title: psychotria verticillata
intro: Psychotria verticillata, also known as the wild coffee or Jamaica tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic, due to its high concentration of caffeine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Psychotria verticillata include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve headaches, and act as a natural remedy for fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be steeped in hot water to make a tea, or dried and used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
